sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Rayo Vallecano have shown mixed form in their last 5 matches, securing 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses, with a recent struggle defensively as they've failed to keep a clean sheet in 6 games. Osasuna, on the other hand, have also had inconsistent results with 2 wins, 2 draws, and 1 loss in their last 5, scoring late in matches but also struggling to keep clean sheets in 4 games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two encounters, Osasuna have had the upper hand with a 2-0 win and a 1-1 draw against Rayo Vallecano. Notably, both teams have scored in 5 of their last 7 meetings, and Osasuna have often been the first to score in recent head-to-heads.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Rayo Vallecano, sitting 13th with 22 points, have underperformed offensively with only 16 goals scored (17th in La Liga), despite high ball possession (54.5%, 4th in league). Osasuna, 12th with the same points tally, have a slightly better attack with 21 goals, and players like Ante Budimir (8 goals, 5th in league) could pose a threat.

sections.subtitle: Key Players to Watch
sections.text: For Rayo Vallecano, Jorge de Frutos (6 goals, 7.11 rating) will be crucial in breaking Osasuna’s defense, while Osasuna’s Ante Budimir, in form with 4 goals in the last 5 matches, could capitalize on Rayo’s defensive vulnerabilities.

sections.subtitle: Tactical Insights
sections.text: Rayo Vallecano’s high possession and ability to create big chances (46, 7th in league) might dominate the game, but their low conversion rate (28.3%, 18th) could hinder them. Osasuna’s strength in aerial duels (led by Lucas Torró, 78.4% won) and late scoring (often in the 76-90th minute) may exploit Rayo’s defensive lapses.

sections.subtitle: Match Prediction
sections.text: Given Sofascore’s probabilities (home win 28%, draw 38%, away win 34%) and current form, a draw seems the most likely outcome. Osasuna’s slight edge in attack and Rayo’s home advantage at Estadio de Vallecas could balance out, with both teams likely to score.
